testcase.name: ForgotPassword03_Resend_Email_Should_Send_Without_Redirect

failure.message: BUG: Click Resend Email nhưng hệ thống redirect. Actual → isStillOnSuccess: false, isBackToForm: true expected [true] but found [false]
